gist.headline: Neon Runner hits the arcade
gist.blurb: Neon Runner just dropped into our games showcase! It's a high-speed infinite runner with a 90s retro-anime vibe that shifts the environment in real-time using AI.
gist.summary: Added Neon Runner, a real-time AI-generated infinite runner game with a 90s retro-anime aesthetic, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play Neon Runner directly from the community games list, experiencing real-time generative AI environments.
gist.visual_concept: A retro arcade setting. Polly the bee wearing a 90s sweatband playing a chunky arcade cabinet showing a neon runner game. Monitor Robot cheering.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a retro 90s neon sweatband, playing a chunky arcade cabinet that displays a glowing infinite runner track. The cute Monitor Robot stands nearby cheering her on with square pixel eyes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, nostalgic but beautiful.
